case_title: PROGRESS APARTMENTS VS. ANTOINE CRAYTON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $7.30 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS APARTMENTS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESS APARTMENTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRAYTON, ANTOINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1272 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE, APARTMENT 301, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94110, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS/TENANTS.**
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CRAYTON, ANTOINE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS APARTMENTS AS TO DEFENDANT CRAYTON, ANTOINE DOES 1 THRU 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS APARTMENTS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS APARTMENTS SERVED MAY-31-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRAYTON, ANTOINE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CRAYTON, ANTOINE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED AS TO DEFENDANT CRAYTON, ANTOINE
